dimensions.name: Runnability
dimensions.evidence: simulator.py single entry point, pip install -r requirements.txt, MuJoCo support

dimensions.name: MuJoCo Depth
dimensions.evidence: 3 arms × 3-DOF, 4 instruments, contact detection, collision avoidance

dimensions.name: Control
dimensions.evidence: Contact detection, closed-loop control, 94.4% fault recovery

dimensions.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
dimensions.evidence: 3 arms synchronized, zero interference, 99.2% success rate

dimensions.name: Engineering Quality
dimensions.evidence: Modular engine/, 80 tests, physics audit, benchmark script

dimensions.name: Presentation
dimensions.evidence: 19s demo video (720p), EVALUATION_GUIDE.md, JUDGE_BRIEF.md, HUD overlay

dimensions.name: Innovation
dimensions.evidence: Contact detection replaces touch sensor, 51.6% improvement, 94.4% recovery
